SEARCH
Package com.hotelreservation.room.controller

Class RoomController

java.lang.Object
com.hotelreservation.room.controller.RoomController
@RestController @RequestMapping("/api/rooms") public class RoomController extends Object
REST controller for hotel room management.

Follows the thin-controller principle: all business logic is delegated to RoomService. This class handles only HTTP concerns: request mapping, validation delegation, response wrapping, and HTTP status codes.

Access policy:

  • GET endpoints — public, no authentication required.
  • POST, PUT, DELETE endpoints — require ROLE_ADMIN.

    Description

    Constructs the controller with the required room service.

    Creates a new hotel room.

  • Constructor Details

    • RoomController

      public RoomController(RoomService roomService)
      Constructs the controller with the required room service.
      Parameters:
      roomService - service handling all room business logic

  • Method Details

    • getAllRooms

      @GetMapping public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<List<RoomDTO>> getAllRooms()
      Retrieves all hotel rooms. Public endpoint — no authentication required.
      Returns:
      200 OK with a list of all rooms; empty list if none exist

    • getRoomById

      @GetMapping("/{roomId}") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<RoomDTO> getRoomById(@PathVariable Long roomId)
      Retrieves a single room by its unique ID. Public endpoint.
      Parameters:
      roomId - the primary key of the room to retrieve
      Returns:
      200 OK with the room details, or 404 if not found

    • createRoom

      @PostMapping @PreAuthorize("hasRole(\'ADMIN\')") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<RoomDTO> createRoom(@Valid @RequestBody @Valid RoomDTO roomDTO)
      Creates a new hotel room. Requires ROLE_ADMIN.
      Parameters:
      roomDTO - the validated room data to persist
      Returns:
      201 Created with the new room (including generated ID)

    • updateRoom

      @PutMapping("/{roomId}") @PreAuthorize("hasRole(\'ADMIN\')") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<RoomDTO> updateRoom(@PathVariable Long roomId, @Valid @RequestBody @Valid RoomDTO roomDTO)
      Updates an existing room's details. Requires ROLE_ADMIN.
      Parameters:
      roomId - the primary key of the room to update
      roomDTO - the validated updated room data
      Returns:
      200 OK with the updated room

    • deleteRoom

      @DeleteMapping("/{roomId}") @PreAuthorize("hasRole(\'ADMIN\')") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<ApiResponse> deleteRoom(@PathVariable Long roomId)
      Deletes a room from the system. Requires ROLE_ADMIN.
      Parameters:
      roomId - the primary key of the room to delete
      Returns:
      200 OK with a success message
